name: Crab Tetrazzini
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cooked fettuccine in a greased 1-quart casserole dish.
2. Melt 2 tablespoons of butter in a large skillet; sauté mushrooms in butter until just tender.
3. Add garlic salt, green onion, parsley, and basil to the mushrooms; sauté for 1 minute.
4. Spoon the mushroom mixture over the fettuccine.
5. Drain the crab meat and arrange it on top of the vegetables.
6. Melt the remaining butter in the skillet; stir in flour.
7. Gradually add chicken broth, stirring constantly until smooth and thickened.
8. Add white wine; continue to cook and stir until well combined.
9. Stir in grated Parmesan cheese until melted.
10. Pour the sauce over the crab meat.
11. Transfer the dish to a preheated 400°F (200°C) oven and bake for 15-20 minutes.
